query: amateur snapshot with crooked tilted horizon, accidentally rotated photo, off-kilter handheld shot
message: composition_and_structure / unconventional_framing — anti_aesthetic. Off-kilter, dutch-angle, accidentally rotated handheld snapshots with informal vernacular framing. Includes parties, sports wipeouts, fallen signs, casual portraiture, awkward angles.

response.objective_caption: An antique piece of agricultural machinery featuring large red spoked wheels and a pale gray metal body sits on a grassy field, photographed from a low angle with dense green trees in the background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A decayed and heavily rusted piece of antique agricultural machinery with large red spoked wheels and a corroded pale gray body sits on grass, its deteriorated metal surfaces covered in orange-brown oxidation, photographed from a low angle against dense green trees.
